CIPHER.220.cipherString: Poetry is the art of uniting pleasure with truth by calling imagination to the help of reason.
CIPHER.220.question: Decrypt the following cipher text that has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.220.author: Johnson

CIPHER.211.question: You found the following carved into the bark of a hollow log. You recognize that it's encoded as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 48725 9736 1502 decode to?

CIPHER.200.cipherString: He feels like a handle broken off a jug, but the jug doesn't know its broken and keeps going to the well.
CIPHER.200.question: Someone has left a coded message on the classroom 3D printer's display. You’re told it's a quote by Wisława Szymborska, written in an Aristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.200.author: Wisława Szymborska

CIPHER.207.cipherString: If listening was as important as speaking, you would have twice as many ears as mouths.
CIPHER.207.question: Ron English offers us some advice that has been encoded as a Checkerboard with a Polybius key of SPECULATION. What does it say?
CIPHER.207.author: Ron English

CIPHER.199.question: A phrase has been encoded using the Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 1033 85697 3024 decode to?

CIPHER.219.cipherString: Focus beyond the finish line celebrate incremental progress along the way for sustained motivation!
CIPHER.219.question: Your Bunsen burner's flame suddenly spelled this Aristocrat message by Felecia Etienne. What does it say?
CIPHER.219.author: Felecia Etienne

CIPHER.218.cipherString: The structural analysis of shells has had a long and difficult history.
CIPHER.218.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote, encrypted using a Porta using a keyword of MORSEL. What does it say?

CIPHER.192.cipherString: Muchas personas no cuidan su dinero hasta que casi han llegado a su fin, y otras hacen lo mismo con su tiempo.
CIPHER.192.question: Etched into the bottom of the cafeteria's mystery-cookie tray: this Xenocrypt quote by Goethe in Spanish using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.192.author: Goethe
CIPHER.192.translation: Many people take no care of their money till they have come nearly to an end of it, and others do just the same with their time.

CIPHER.195.cipherString: If men will not act for themselves, what will they do when the benefit of their effort is for all?
CIPHER.195.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote by Elbert Hubbard, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has ATWILL somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.195.author: Elbert Hubbard

CIPHER.216.cipherString: The sun, too, shines into cesspools, and is not polluted.
CIPHER.216.question: An explorer's journal mentions a “hidden truth” encoded below. It turns out to be a quote, written in a Baconian Cipher. What does it say?

CIPHER.209.cipherString: Time is the worst kind of thief, sneaky and effective and gone before you realize what's been taken.
CIPHER.209.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Isabel Ibañez encoded in an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.209.author: Isabel Ibañez

CIPHER.205.cipherString: The man who interprets Nature is always held in great honor.
CIPHER.205.question: You find an encoded message in the test tube rack, written on masking tape. It's a quote by Zora Neale Hurston, written in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.205.author: Zora Neale Hurston

CIPHER.204.cipherString: The best philosophy is to live in the present moment while planning for the future and learning from the past.
CIPHER.204.question: A message flashes briefly on a malfunctioning computer screen. It turns out to be a quote by Shree Shambav written in an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains the word THE four times. What does it say?
CIPHER.204.author: Shree Shambav

CIPHER.208.cipherString: Ghosts visit only those who look for them.
CIPHER.208.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by Holtei encoded as a Baconian. You are told that the deciphered text starts with GHOS. What does it say?
CIPHER.208.author: Holtei

CIPHER.210.cipherString: Adaptability is a most desirable habit or quality for success in life.
CIPHER.210.question: Your science fair project logs contain a mysterious string of letters. It's a quote by Sivananda Saraswati, encoded as a Porta. The 36th through 42nd cipher characters (DLXRWLL) decode to be QUALITY. What does it say?
CIPHER.210.author: Sivananda Saraswati

CIPHER.215.cipherString: To shine your brightest light is to be who you truly are.
CIPHER.215.question: Your lava lamp started bubbling in Nihilist Substitution code by Roy T. Bennett with a keyword of NEURAL and Polybius key of EDUCATING. What does it say?
CIPHER.215.author: Roy T. Bennett

CIPHER.194.cipherString: The mother principle is that governments are republican only in proportion as they embody the will of their people, and execute it..
CIPHER.194.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Thomas Jefferson, written as a Patristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains EIT. What does it say?
CIPHER.194.author: Thomas Jefferson

CIPHER.191.question: A glitchy hologram in the school planetarium displays this Hill encoded quote using a keyword of FIND. What does it say?
CIPHER.191.author: French

CIPHER.217.cipherString: I haven't been able to sleep before entering the house; I'm that thrilled to share the same stage as him. It's an absolute dream come true.
CIPHER.217.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote by Nikki Tamboli, written as a Patristocrat using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with RUE. What does it say?
CIPHER.217.author: Nikki Tamboli

CIPHER.212.cipherString: One part of wisdom is knowing what you don't need anymore and letting it go.
CIPHER.212.question: A riddle is discovered taped under a chemistry lab bench. It's a quote by Jane Fonda, encrypted as a Checkerboard. The 25th through 30th cipher units (CO TS PA TA OS TT) decode to be WHATYO. What does it say?
CIPHER.212.author: Jane Fonda

CIPHER.197.question: A vending machine just dispensed a candy wrapper with this Hill code with a keyword of EXPLORERS. What does it say?

CIPHER.201.cipherString: Toil and pleasure, dissimilar in nature, are nevertheless united by a certain natural bond.
CIPHER.201.question: The gym's scoreboard glitched during dodgeball to show this Checkerboard Cipher by Livy with a Polybius key of COMPATIBLE. What does it say?
CIPHER.201.author: Livy

CIPHER.206.cipherString: Obviously the imagination is fueled by emotions beyond the control of the conscious mind.
CIPHER.206.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Joyce Carol Oates encoded with an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains the word THE thrice. What does it say?
CIPHER.206.author: Joyce Carol Oates

CIPHER.193.cipherString: The more you are in this business, the more humbled by it you become.
CIPHER.193.question: This coded note is discovered inside a sealed envelope labeled “Confidential.” It's a quote by Meryl Streep, encoded using a Nihilist Substitution Cipher with a keyword length of 5. The 22nd through 31st cipher units (54 36 38 34 77 54 58 48 34 46) decode to be SINESSTHEM. What does it say?
CIPHER.193.author: Meryl Streep

CIPHER.196.cipherString: Everyone has a right to a university degree in America, even if it's in Hamburger Technology.
CIPHER.196.question: You discover a scrap of paper tucked inside an old lab notebook. It contains a quote by Clive James encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.196.author: Clive James

CIPHER.203.cipherString: What you perceive as a failure today may actually be a crucial step towards the success you seek. Never give up.
CIPHER.203.question: Hidden in the source code of a retro video game, this Complete Columnar puzzle reveals a quote by Richelle E. Goodrich. The quote has RETODA somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.203.author: Richelle E. Goodrich

CIPHER.214.cipherString: Don't only think of succeeding in what you are doing but excel in it and use your position to solve problem.
CIPHER.214.question: You came across the following written on a wall in a cave. You are told that it's a quote by Takyiwaa Manuh encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Key Phrase used to encode it?
CIPHER.214.author: Takyiwaa Manuh

CIPHER.213.cipherString: I still can't believe it, but it looks like it was a big deal.
CIPHER.213.question: A laser-etched message on the inside of a geodes crystal reads: solve this Nihilist Substitution version of Rayssa Leal's wisdom with a keyword of ABOUND and Polybius key of REDUCTION. What does it say?
CIPHER.213.author: Rayssa Leal

CIPHER.198.cipherString: After weeks of indoor work it actually felt good to be doing something--clean, direct, muscles and mind.
CIPHER.198.question: Your robot vacuum just projected this message onto the ceiling. It's a quote by Gregory Benford encoded with an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.198.author: Gregory Benford

CIPHER.202.cipherString: La infidelidad y la fe miran a ambos a través del cristal de la perspectiva, pero en extremos opuestos
CIPHER.202.question: Projected by a broken laser pointer during physics class, solve this Xenocrypt quote in Spanish from Bishop Hall using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.202.author: Bishop Hall
CIPHER.202.translation: Infidelity and faith look both through the perspective glass, but at contrary ends
